message:
fix(tests): correct test assertions + refresh cutover guard validation

Test assertion corrections:
- agent_provider_bridge_integration: fix ambiguous_process_resolution
  test — CautService::from_provider now correctly returns
  Some(CautService::Anthropic) for Claude Code provider (was None)
- proptest_completion_tracker_telemetry: fix mixed_operations advances
  count from 3 to 2 — timeouts don't go through advance path
- proptest_pattern_telemetry: update test rule ID from
  "test.telemetry:keyword" to "wezterm.test_telemetry" to match
  the validated rule ID format (colon separator not allowed)

docs/asupersync-cutover-runtime-guard-validation.json:
- Regenerated validation artifact reflecting current codebase state
  after rustfmt pass and feature gate changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ use frankenterm_core::patterns::{PatternEngine, PatternPack, PatternTelemetrySna
 
 fn minimal_engine() -> PatternEngine {
     let rule = RuleDef {
-        id: "test.telemetry:keyword".to_string(),
+        id: "wezterm.test_telemetry".to_string(),
         agent_type: frankenterm_core::patterns::AgentType::Unknown,
         event_type: "test_event".to_string(),
         severity: frankenterm_core::patterns::Severity::Info,
